description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:alpine Docker image. Define a test stage with a test job that installs postgresql-dev, gcc, and musl-dev via apk, runs pip install -r requirements.txt, and echoes \"testing\". Add two deploy-stage jobs: a production job that runs only on tags, installs ruby and related packages via apk, installs the dpl gem, and deploys to Heroku with dpl using $HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY and $HEROKU_APP_NAME; and a staging job that runs on all non‑tag commits, performs the same apk and gem steps, and deploys to Heroku using $HEROKU_APP_STAGING_NAME. Both deploy jobs set the appropriate environment (production or staging).
